ddls:
CREATE TABLE "launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the launch */,
  "time_utc" TEXT /* Time of the launch in UTC */,
  "booster_version" TEXT /* Version of the booster used */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch site */,
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payload */,
  "payload_mass_kg" REAL /* Mass of the payload in kilograms */,
  "orbit" TEXT /* Intended orbit for the payload */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "mission_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the mission */,
  "landing_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the landing */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission */,
  "environmental_conditions_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental conditions */,
  "launch_cost" REAL /* Cost of the launch */,
  "launch_status" TEXT /* Current status of the launch */,
  "launch_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the launch */,
  "launch_photos" TEXT /* URLs to photos of the launch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_payload_id FOREIGN KEY ("payload_id") REFERENCES payloads ("payload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_environmental_conditions_id FOREIGN KEY ("environmental_conditions_id") REFERENCES environmental_conditions ("environmental_conditions_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_launch_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_site_id") REFERENCES launch_sites ("launch_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_sites" (
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the launch site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the launch site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the launch site */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the launch site */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of launches the site can handle per year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the launch site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payloads" (
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payload */,
  "payload_name" TEXT /* Name of the payload */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payload */,
  "payload_type" TEXT /* Type of payload */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the payload */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the payload was manufactured */,
  "payload_status" TEXT /* Current status of the payload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payloads_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the customer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the customer */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Current status of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the mission */,
  "mission_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mission */,
  "mission_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mission */,
  "mission_cost" REAL /* Cost of the mission */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission */,
  "mission_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the mission */,
  "mission_photos" TEXT /* URLs to photos of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission outcome */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (mission or landing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the outcome */,
  "outcome_photos" TEXT /* URLs to photos of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_outcomes_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "environmental_conditions_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of environmental conditions */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the launch site */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the launch site */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the launch site */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the launch site */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the launch site */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the launch site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environmental_conditions_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)
column_names: Time of the launch in UTC
Mass of the payload in kilograms
URL to a video of the launch
URLs to photos of the launch
Unique identifier for each launch site
Maximum number of launches the site can handle per year
Current status of the launch site
Reference to the manufacturer of the payload
Contact phone number for the customer
URL to a video of the mission
URLs to photos of the mission
Unique identifier for each mission outcome
URL to a video of the outcome
URLs to photos of the outcome
